sentences.translation: Karim se probudio i pronašao prozor otvoren.
sentences.translationEn: Karim woke up and found his window open.

sentences.translation: On ga nije otvorio prije spavanja.
sentences.translationEn: He had not opened it before sleeping.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرَ إِلَى الْخَارِجِ فَرَأَى طَائِرًا جَمِيلًا عَلَى الشُّبَّاكِ.
sentences.translation: Pogledao je napolje i vidio lijepu pticu na prozorčiću.
sentences.translationEn: He looked outside and saw a beautiful bird on the windowsill.

sentences.arabic: رُبَّمَا فَتَحَ الرِّيحُ النَّافِذَةَ فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Možda je vjetar otvorio prozor noću.
sentences.translationEn: Perhaps the wind opened the window in the night.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ كَرِيمٌ أَنْ يُغْلِقَ النَّافِذَةَ جَيِّدًا كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Karim je odlučio dobro zatvori prozor svake večeri.
sentences.translationEn: Karim decided to close the window properly every night.
